name: Canada
overview: Co-hosts of the 2026 World Cup, Canada make their return to football's greatest stage for the first time since 1986. Under Jesse Marsch, Les Rouges are built around the electrifying Alphonso Davies and a generation of talent forged in Europe's top leagues. Playing in front of home crowds in Toronto, Vancouver, and Edmonton, Canada aim to reach the knockout rounds for the first time in their history.
strengths: Team unity and defensive work rate
meta_title: Canada World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Canada World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and full team guide. Profile of the 2026 co-hosts on FootBrowse.

name: Mexico
overview: Eighteen-time participants and co-hosts, Mexico arrive at the 2026 World Cup with enormous expectation from their passionate fanbase. Javier Aguirre has steadied the ship after a turbulent qualifying cycle, and with Santiago Giménez leading the attack, El Tri carry genuine knockout-stage ambitions. The Azteca crowd alone is worth a goal — but so is the pressure of hosting.
weaknesses: Notorious Round of 16 curse (seven consecutive exits)
Defensive fragility against top European sides
meta_title: Mexico World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Mexico World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and full team guide. El Tri co-host the 2026 tournament — full profile on FootBrowse.

name: United States
overview: Co-hosts of the 2026 World Cup, the United States enter with the greatest expectation in the programme's history. Christian Pulisic leads a young, ambitious squad galvanised by Mauricio Pochettino's high-press system. Playing in front of enormous home crowds at SoFi, MetLife, and AT&T, the USMNT have the talent, the stage, and the motivation to make a deep run.
meta_title: USA World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Odds | FootBrowse
meta_description: United States World Cup 2026 squad, home fixtures, betting odds and predictions. Full USMNT team guide on FootBrowse.

name: Japan
overview: Asia's most consistent World Cup nation, Japan arrive in North America having twice shocked Germany and Spain in 2022. Hajime Moriyasu's side blend Premier League-proven talent — Wataru Endo, Takefusa Kubo, Kaoru Mitoma — with collective discipline and tactical intelligence that has made them genuine threats against any opponent.
meta_title: Japan World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Japan World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Samurai Blue profile on FootBrowse.

name: New Zealand
overview: The All Whites make their third World Cup appearance and first since 2010, qualifying through the OFC pathway. Built around the prolific Chris Wood, New Zealand are a compact, well-organised side who will relish the underdog role and compete hard for every point in their group.
strengths: Chris Wood's physicality and aerial threat
meta_title: New Zealand World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: New Zealand World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full All Whites profile on FootBrowse.

name: Iran
overview: Team Melli are one of Asia's most experienced World Cup nations, making their seventh appearance under coach Amir Ghalenoei. Iran are a physically imposing, well-drilled side capable of grinding results. Their campaign in Qatar — which included a famous upset of Wales — demonstrated their ability to compete at the highest level.
weaknesses: Limited attacking creativity against deep blocks
meta_title: Iran World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Iran World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Team Melli profile on FootBrowse.

name: Uzbekistan
overview: Uzbekistan make their historic World Cup debut, capping a remarkable rise under Slovenian coach Srecko Katanec. Led by Roma striker Eldor Shomurodov, the White Wolves are one of the most exciting debut nations — technically gifted, young, and increasingly competitive against the best in Asia.
meta_title: Uzbekistan World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Uzbekistan World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and debut guide. Full White Wolves profile on FootBrowse.

name: Jordan
overview: Jordan make their World Cup debut in landmark fashion, becoming the first Jordanian team to grace football's greatest stage. Guided by coach Hussein Ammouta, the Nashama qualified with impressive discipline and defensive solidity throughout the AFC campaign, and will look to make history count when they step out in North America.
weaknesses: Limited attacking firepower at elite level
meta_title: Jordan World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Jordan World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and debut guide. Full Nashama profile on FootBrowse.

name: South Korea
overview: South Korea's most decorated captain Son Heung-min leads the Taeguk Warriors into their twelfth World Cup. Under Hong Myung-bo, South Korea combine Son's individual brilliance with a high-energy collective style. The nation that stunned the world in 2002 by reaching the semi-finals carries the same belief that miracles are possible.
weaknesses: Over-reliance on Son in key moments
meta_title: South Korea World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: South Korea World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Taeguk Warriors profile on FootBrowse.

name: Australia
overview: The Socceroos return to the World Cup under Tony Popovic, building on the spirit of their 2022 round-of-16 run that captivated the nation. Australia play a direct, high-energy style with a squad spread across Europe's major leagues. The loss of Tim Cahill's leadership era is well offset by a talented new generation ready to prove themselves.
meta_title: Australia World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Australia World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Socceroos profile on FootBrowse.

name: Qatar
overview: Qatar return to the World Cup for a second time, looking to improve on their 2022 group-stage exit on home soil. The Maroons are a technically polished side developed through the Aspire Academy system, and while they remain heavy underdogs, they have improved significantly as a footballing nation over the past decade.
weaknesses: Exposed against elite pace and power
Limited big-game experience away from home
meta_title: Qatar World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Qatar World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Maroons profile on FootBrowse.

name: Saudi Arabia
overview: Saudi Arabia return to the World Cup on the back of their stunning 2022 upset of Argentina. Under Roberto Mancini, the Green Falcons are building a more structured and tactically versatile side. With a domestic league now attracting global stars, Saudi football is in a period of genuine ambition and growth.
meta_title: Saudi Arabia World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Saudi Arabia World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Green Falcons profile on FootBrowse.

name: Argentina
overview: Reigning world champions Argentina return to defend their crown under Lionel Scaloni's meticulous system. With Lionel Messi — the greatest player of all time — potentially playing in his final World Cup on North American soil, La Albiceleste carry the same hunger and unity that made them unstoppable in Qatar. The depth, the belief, and the champion DNA are all present.
meta_title: Argentina World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Odds | FootBrowse
meta_description: Argentina World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, betting odds and predictions. Defending champions guide on FootBrowse.

name: Brazil
overview: The most decorated nation in World Cup history, Brazil arrive at the 2026 tournament seeking a record sixth title. With Vinicius Júnior at the peak of his powers and a dazzling supporting cast, A Seleção blend the flair Brazil is famous for with renewed defensive solidity under Dorival Júnior. The heartbreak of 2022 quarter-final defeat to Croatia fuels a renewed sense of purpose.
meta_title: Brazil World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Odds | FootBrowse
meta_description: Brazil World Cup 2026 squad, group stage fixtures, betting odds and predictions. Full team guide on FootBrowse.

name: Ecuador
overview: Ecuador make their fifth World Cup appearance under Sebastián Beccacece, led by the indefatigable Enner Valencia — their all-time leading scorer who is also their captain. La Tri are a compact, direct, and physically imposing side who have consistently punched above their weight on the global stage.
meta_title: Ecuador World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Ecuador World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full La Tri profile on FootBrowse.

name: Paraguay
overview: Paraguay return to the World Cup for the ninth time, qualifying through a competitive South American campaign. Gustavo Alfaro has forged a resilient, hard-to-beat unit captained by the commanding Gustavo Gómez. Los Guaraníes are at their best when organised and disciplined, and they will be nobody's easy game in North America.
strengths: Set piece threat from Gustavo Gómez
weaknesses: Lack of creative spark in midfield
meta_title: Paraguay World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Paraguay World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Los Guaraníes profile on FootBrowse.

name: Uruguay
overview: Two-time world champions Uruguay punch emphatically above their weight under the demanding tutelage of Marcelo Bielsa. La Celeste are blessed with a new generation of Premier League talent alongside the veteran nous of the Suárez era — and with Bielsa's relentless intensity, they are one of the most difficult sides in the tournament to beat.
strengths: Rodrigo Bentancur and Darwin Núñez quality
weaknesses: Bielsa's demands can exhaust squads mid-tournament
meta_title: Uruguay World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Uruguay World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full La Celeste profile on FootBrowse.

name: Colombia
overview: Colombia arrive at 2026 as one of CONMEBOL's in-form sides, having dominated much of qualifying under Néstor Lorenzo. James Rodríguez — the 2014 Golden Boot winner — anchors a vibrant squad including Luis Díaz and Richard Ríos. Los Cafeteros have the quality to reach the quarter-finals and the flair to go further.
strengths: Luis Díaz's pace on the wing
weaknesses: Pressure of expectations after Copa América 2024 final
meta_title: Colombia World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Colombia World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Los Cafeteros profile on FootBrowse.

name: Morocco
overview: Africa's finest, Morocco stunned the world in 2022 by becoming the first African nation to reach a World Cup semi-final. Coach Walid Regragui has built one of the most organised and resilient sides in world football — compact, tactically intelligent, and capable of beating anyone on their day. In 2026, the Atlas Lions believe they can go one further.
meta_title: Morocco World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Odds | FootBrowse
meta_description: Morocco World Cup 2026 squad, group stage fixtures, betting odds and predictions. Full Atlas Lions team guide on FootBrowse.

name: Tunisia
overview: Tunisia make their seventh World Cup appearance — the joint most of any African nation — under the guidance of Jalel Kadri. The Eagles of Carthage are organised and technically sound, with Youssef Msakni providing craft and experience in behind the striker. Their aim is to finally break through the group stage barrier for the first time.
meta_title: Tunisia World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Tunisia World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Eagles of Carthage profile on FootBrowse.

name: Egypt
overview: Egypt return to the World Cup for the first time since 1990, and they do so with the greatest player in their history: Mohamed Salah. Now at the peak of his powers and in the twilight of his international career, Salah is desperate to lead the Pharaohs deep into the tournament. Built around his genius, Egypt have the firepower to cause serious upsets.
weaknesses: Dependence on Salah for creativity and goals
Defensive experience at World Cup level
meta_title: Egypt World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Egypt World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Pharaohs profile on FootBrowse.

name: Algeria
overview: 2019 AFCON champions Algeria return to the World Cup under Djamel Belmadi with Riyad Mahrez leading the charge. The Desert Foxes play an attractive, possession-based style when at full tilt, and with Mahrez operating behind a lethal front line, they are capable of defeating any team on their day in North America.
meta_title: Algeria World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Algeria World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Desert Foxes profile on FootBrowse.

name: Ghana
overview: The Black Stars make their fifth World Cup appearance, driven by the memory of 2010 when they came within a penalty kick of becoming the first African side to reach a semi-final. Under Otto Addo and captained by Arsenal's Thomas Partey, Ghana blend technical quality with the Ghanaian brand of passionate, physical football.
strengths: History of raising their game at World Cups
weaknesses: Goalscoring reliability after Asamoah Gyan era
meta_title: Ghana World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Ghana World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Black Stars profile on FootBrowse.

name: Cape Verde
overview: Cape Verde make a stunning debut at the World Cup, capping an extraordinary rise from one of Africa's smallest footballing nations. The Blue Sharks have built steadily through Africa Cup of Nations campaigns and now arrive on the world stage for the first time, led by the experienced Bubista and a squad of Portuguese-based players ready to represent their islands with pride.
meta_title: Cape Verde World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Cape Verde World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and debut guide. Full Blue Sharks profile on FootBrowse.

name: Senegal
overview: African champions Senegal are among the continent's most dangerous World Cup sides. Under Aliou Cissé — himself a veteran of 2002 — the Lions of Teranga play aggressive, high-energy football led by the indomitable Sadio Mané. Having won the 2022 AFCON, Senegal carry a winning mentality that makes them genuine dark-horse contenders.
meta_title: Senegal World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Senegal World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Lions of Teranga profile on FootBrowse.

name: South Africa
overview: Bafana Bafana return to the World Cup for the first time since hosting in 2010, qualified under the steady hand of Hugo Broos. South Africa have rebuilt with a generation of talent playing across Europe, and Percy Tau leads a side that has rediscovered the belief that saw them shock the world as the 2010 hosts.
strengths: Home continent momentum from CAF qualifying
meta_title: South Africa World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: South Africa World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Bafana Bafana profile on FootBrowse.

name: Ivory Coast
overview: 2024 AFCON champions Ivory Coast come to North America riding a wave of continental confidence under Emerse Faé. The Elephants have a generation of Premier League quality — Franck Kessié, Sébastien Haller, Nicolas Pépé — and the belief that they can finally translate their domestic star power into a deep World Cup run.
weaknesses: History of underperforming at World Cups
meta_title: Ivory Coast World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Ivory Coast World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Elephants profile on FootBrowse.

name: England
overview: England arrive at 2026 under the ambitious Thomas Tuchel, desperate to end 60 years of hurt. Harry Kane leads a squad of extraordinary depth — Bellingham, Saka, Foden, White — and the Three Lions have the quality to challenge for the title. After back-to-back tournament finals under Southgate, the belief that this time is England's time has never been stronger.
strengths: Jude Bellingham and Phil Foden's quality
weaknesses: Tournament final experience (lost Euro 2020 and 2024 finals)
meta_title: England World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: England World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Three Lions profile on FootBrowse.

name: France
overview: Two-time World Cup champions France enter the 2026 tournament as one of the pre-tournament favourites. Under the steady hand of Didier Deschamps, Les Bleus boast a generational talent in Kylian Mbappé alongside a squad of exceptional depth. Having lifted the trophy in 1998 on home soil and again in 2018 in Russia, France have the pedigree, the personnel, and the ruthlessness to challenge for a third title.
weaknesses: Reliance on Mbappé in big moments
meta_title: France World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Odds | FootBrowse
meta_description: France World Cup 2026 squad, group stage fixtures, betting odds and predictions. Full team guide on FootBrowse.

name: Croatia
overview: Croatia are one of international football's great overachievers. Under the astute Zlatko Dalić and led by the incomparable Luka Modrić — now playing what may be his final World Cup — the Vatreni are compact, technically excellent, and ferocious in midfield. They reached the final in 2018 and the semi-finals in 2022, and they know how to go deep in tournaments.
meta_title: Croatia World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Croatia World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Vatreni profile on FootBrowse.

name: Portugal
overview: Portugal arrive in North America with an extraordinary squad and a potentially once-in-a-lifetime alignment of star power. Cristiano Ronaldo leads his nation for what is almost certainly his final World Cup, flanked by Bernardo Silva, Bruno Fernandes, and Vitinha. Under Roberto Martínez's sophisticated system, this generation of Portuguese talent has the quality to win the tournament.
strengths: Bernardo Silva and Bruno Fernandes creativity
meta_title: Portugal World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Portugal World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Seleção das Quinas profile on FootBrowse.

name: Norway
overview: Norway make their long-awaited return to the World Cup, fuelled by the most lethal striker on the planet in Erling Haaland. Martin Ødegaard's technical excellence in midfield combines with Haaland's relentless finishing to form one of the most feared partnerships in world football. Under Ståle Solbakken, Norway could be the tournament's biggest dark horse.
weaknesses: Defensive organisation against elite possession sides
meta_title: Norway World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Norway World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full profile featuring Erling Haaland on FootBrowse.

name: Germany
overview: Four-time world champions Germany are on a mission of redemption after crashing out in the group stage in 2018 and 2022. Julian Nagelsmann has reinvigorated Die Mannschaft, restoring the tactical structure and collective intensity that made Germany perennial contenders. Ilkay Gündoğan, Florian Wirtz, and Jamal Musiala provide world-class quality throughout.
strengths: Jamal Musiala and Florian Wirtz's quality
meta_title: Germany World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Germany World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Die Mannschaft profile on FootBrowse.

name: Netherlands
overview: Three-time World Cup finalists, the Netherlands carry the weight of the trophy that always seems to elude them. Ronald Koeman has assembled a squad of genuine quality — Virgil van Dijk, Cody Gakpo, Tijjani Reijnders, Xavi Simons — and the Oranje go into 2026 with the conviction that their time has finally come.
strengths: Cody Gakpo's clinical pace and power
weaknesses: History of imploding in semi-finals and finals
meta_title: Netherlands World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Netherlands World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Oranje profile on FootBrowse.

name: Switzerland
overview: Switzerland are perennial qualifiers and reliable performers under Murat Yakin, consistently reaching the round of 16 and occasionally the quarter-finals. Granit Xhaka anchors a well-organised, technically sound side that rarely concedes cheap goals. The Swiss don't seek the limelight — they quietly beat teams that underestimate them.
weaknesses: Dependent on Xhaka's fitness and form

meta_description: Switzerland World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Nati profile on FootBrowse.

name: Scotland
overview: Scotland end a 28-year World Cup absence at the most prestigious stage of all, qualifying in emotional fashion under Steve Clarke. The Tartan Army travels with enormous pride and cautious optimism — Andrew Robertson and Scott McTominay lead a squad that is far better organised and harder to beat than their historical record suggests.
strengths: Team spirit and defensive work rate
weaknesses: No World Cup group-stage escape in history

name: Spain
overview: Euro 2024 champions Spain carry enormous momentum into the 2026 World Cup. Luis de la Fuente has refreshed La Roja with a dazzling new generation — headlined by the peerless Pedri — while retaining the possession-based identity that made Spain world champions in 2010. Their midfield is arguably the best in the world and they have the firepower to beat any opponent.

meta_description: Spain World Cup 2026 squad, group stage fixtures, betting odds and predictions. Euro 2024 champions guide on FootBrowse.

name: Austria
overview: Austria's footballing renaissance under Ralf Rangnick has been one of Europe's great coaching stories. Rangnick's high-intensity pressing system has transformed the national team into a cohesive, aggressive unit that knocked France out of Euro 2024's group stage. Marcel Sabitzer leads a squad punching well above its weight.
strengths: Marcel Sabitzer and Marko Arnautovic quality
weaknesses: Limited depth to sustain pressing intensity
History of group-stage exits at World Cups

name: Belgium
overview: Belgium's golden generation may have passed its peak, but Kevin De Bruyne — one of the finest midfielders ever — remains world-class as captain under Domenico Tedesco. A new wave of Belgian talent including Amadou Onana and Lois Openda ensures the Red Devils remain dangerous. The target is to finally win the trophy their talent always promised.
strengths: Kevin De Bruyne's exceptional vision and quality
Blend of experienced and young talent
weaknesses: Ageing key players from the golden generation
Defensive frailties at the highest level

name: Bosnia and Herzegovina
overview: Bosnia and Herzegovina make only their second World Cup appearance, with the legendary Edin Džeko leading them once more. The Dragons qualified through a competitive European campaign and will be determined to improve on their 2014 debut group exit. A passionate fanbase and a core of quality European-based players give them genuine hope.

meta_description: Bosnia and Herzegovina World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Dragons profile on FootBrowse.

name: Sweden
overview: Sweden return to the World Cup in the post-Zlatan era, with a new generation rising under Jon Dahl Tomasson. Alexander Isak provides the attacking threat in a well-drilled, disciplined Swedish side that is notoriously difficult to break down. Thirteen appearances give the Blågult the experience to navigate any group, and the quality to threaten beyond it.

meta_description: Sweden World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Blågult profile on FootBrowse.

name: Turkey
overview: Turkey arrive at the 2026 World Cup on the back of an outstanding Euro 2024 quarter-final run that electrified European football. Under Vincenzo Montella, the Crescent Stars play a dynamic, attack-minded game with Hakan Çalhanoğlu dictating tempo from deep. They are a dangerous team with recent big-tournament experience and genuine belief.
strengths: Hakan Çalhanoğlu's world-class range of passing
High energy and direct attacking intent
weaknesses: World Cup experience gap (first time since 2002)
Pressure of high expectations from Turkish public

name: Czech Republic
overview: The Czech Republic make their tenth World Cup appearance, drawing on a proud tradition that includes two Czechoslovakia final appearances. Under Ivan Hašek, the Lions are led by the powerful Tomáš Souček and count on a squad of Bundesliga and Premier League experience. Compact, determined, and capable of the unexpected.
weaknesses: Limited star quality in attacking areas

name: Panama
overview: Panama make their second World Cup appearance, building on the historic debut of 2018 under Thomas Christiansen. Los Canaleros are a physical, well-organised side built on defensive structure, and they will relish the CONCACAF home-continent advantage with passionate support across the host cities.
meta_title: Panama World Cup 2026 — Squad, Fixtures & Guide | FootBrowse
meta_description: Panama World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Los Canaleros profile on FootBrowse.

name: Curaçao
overview: Curaçao make a stunning debut at the World Cup, representing one of the smallest nations ever to qualify for the tournament. An island of just 150,000 people, the Knipselmannen have punched far above their weight through CONCACAF qualification and will carry the pride of a whole island into each match in North America.
strengths: Players hardened in Dutch and European football
weaknesses: Smallest player pool in the tournament

name: Haiti
overview: Haiti make their second World Cup appearance after a 52-year absence, an achievement of enormous significance for a nation that has shown extraordinary resilience in the face of adversity. The Grenadiers will compete with pride and purpose, drawing on a growing diaspora of French and North American-based professionals.
weaknesses: No World Cup experience for decades

meta_description: Haiti World Cup 2026 squad, fixtures, and team guide. Full Grenadiers profile on FootBrowse.

name: DR Congo
overview: DR Congo — formerly Zaire — return to the World Cup for the first time since 1974 after qualifying via the inter-confederation playoff. The Leopards are a physically imposing, technically capable side built around Chancel Mbemba's leadership and a core of players from Belgium's top division and beyond. Africa's third-most populous nation arrives hungry to write a new chapter.
strengths: Hungry squad motivated by long absence
weaknesses: High-pressure knockout mentality untested at this level

name: Iraq
overview: Iraq return to the World Cup for only the second time, qualifying via the inter-confederation playoff after an impressive AFC campaign. The Lions of Mesopotamia are a young, improving team under Jesús Casas, fuelled by a generation of players determined to restore Iraq to Asian football's elite. A passionate nation stands behind them.
weaknesses: Small professional base outside the region
